mission.title: knative-eventing: Upgrade tests for knative eventing
mission.description: Upgrade tests for knative eventing. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current knative-eventing deployment
steps.description:
Verify your knative-eventing version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing
helm list -n knative-eventing 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working knative-eventing installation.

steps.title: Review knative-eventing configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing
kubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing
```
**Problem**
Found basic issues when upgrading my cluster from v0.10.1 to current head (v0.11.0). This was fixed asap when brought up in slack channel. However it exposed a gap in E2E tests.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Upgrade tests for knative eventing
steps.description:
- Adding upgrade & downgrade tests with a prober that can be used in e2e tests and in operator e2e tests
- Tests can run with serving component, but it's not required

For more verbose description see: `test/upgrade/README.md` in changed files.

**Release Note**

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Upgrade knative-eventing to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade knative-eventing:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade knative-eventing knative-eventing/knative-eventing --namespace knative-eventing
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative-eventing
helm list -n knative-eventing
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing
kubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Upgrade tests for knative eventing" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
- Adding upgrade & downgrade tests with a prober that can be used in e2e tests and in operator e2e tests
- Tests can run with serving component, but it's not required

For more verbose description see: `test/upgrade/README.md` in changed files.

**Release Note**

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible.
